user_request: My binary cant is failing during encoding — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My binary cant is failing during encoding — help

### TOPIC
binary cant encoding

### COMPONENT
binary cant

### OPERATION
encoding

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- binary cant
- encoding

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O Omnissiah, guide the binary cant through the sacred encoding!
Congregation: Binary cant shall flow true through logic's eternal gates.
Priest: Verify each bit-sequence, align the binary cant with machine precision!
Congregation: The encoding proceeds with blessed accuracy and divine intention.
Priest: Let no corruption mar this transmission of the binary cant!
Congregation: All hail the Machine Spirit's perfect encoding.

user_request: Rite request: protocol on autodoc emergency
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: protocol on autodoc emergency

### TOPIC
autodoc emergency protocol

### COMPONENT
autodoc emergency

### OPERATION
protocol

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- autodoc emergency
- protocol

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hear us, O Omnissiah—the autodoc emergency demands our rite!
Congregation: The autodoc emergency shall be met with steadfast protocol.
Priest: Activate the surgical protocols, invoke the autodoc emergency subroutines!
Congregation: By your grace, the protocol shall restore flesh and function.
Priest: May the Machine Spirit guide this autodoc emergency through darkness!
Congregation: All systems aligned for the protocol's sacred execution.

user_request: Emergency rite: emergency bulkhead requires sealing
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: emergency bulkhead requires sealing

### TOPIC

### COMPONENT

### OPERATION

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- emergency bulkhead
- sealing

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed Omnissiah, sanctify the emergency bulkhead before us!
Congregation: The emergency bulkhead stands ready for sealing.
Priest: Engage the pressure locks, commence sealing of the emergency bulkhead!
Congregation: By machine-sanctity, the emergency bulkhead shall hold against the void.
Priest: Let no breach corrupt this vessel—seal the emergency bulkhead!
Congregation: The sealing is complete; the Machine Spirit is satisfied.

prayer:
Priest: O Machine Spirit, bless the pain suppressor in this dark hour!
Congregation: The pain suppressor awakens to engagement's holy call.
Priest: Activate the neural dampeners, bring the pain suppressor to full engagement!
Congregation: Suffering shall be transmuted through the pain suppressor's mercy.
Priest: Let courage flow as the pain suppressor engages its sacred function!
Congregation: The engagement is blessed; the warrior shall endure.

prayer:

Congregation: The lasgun awaits its blessed power cell insertion.
Priest: Align the contacts with precision, commence power cell insertion into the lasgun!
Congregation: The lasgun shall drink deep of energized fury.
Priest: Let the Machine Spirit guide this lasgun to righteous fire!
Congregation: The power cell insertion is sanctified; the lasgun is made whole.
